pg103-p1-s1: We feel that each family, in the light of their own circumstances, ought to decide for themselves.
pg103-p1: We feel that each family, in the light of their own circumstances, ought to decide for themselves.
pg103-p2-s1: We are careful never to show intolerance or hatred of drinking as an institution.
pg103-p2-s2:
Experience shows that such an attitude
is not helpful to anyone.
pg103-p2-s3:
Every new alcoholic looks for this spirit among us and is immensely relieved when he finds we
are not witch burners.
pg103-p2-s4:
A spirit of intolerance might repel alcoholics whose lives could have been saved, had it not been
for such stupidity.
pg103-p2-s5:
We would not even do the cause of temperate drinking any good, for not one drinker in a thousand
likes to be told anything about alcohol by one who hates it.
pg103-p2:
We are careful never to show intolerance or hatred of drinking as an institution. Experience shows that such an attitude
is not helpful to anyone. Every new alcoholic looks for this spirit among us and is immensely relieved when he finds we
are not witch burners. A spirit of intolerance might repel alcoholics whose lives could have been saved, had it not been
for such stupidity. We would not even do the cause of temperate drinking any good, for not one drinker in a thousand
likes to be told anything about alcohol by one who hates it.
pg103-p3-s1:
Some day we hope that Alcoholics Anonymous will help the public to a better realization of the gravity of the alcoholic
problem, but we shall be of little use if our attitude is one of bitterness or hostility.
pg103-p3-s2:
Drinkers will not stand for
it.
pg103-p3:
Some day we hope that Alcoholics Anonymous will help the public to a better realization of the gravity of the alcoholic
problem, but we shall be of little use if our attitude is one of bitterness or hostility. Drinkers will not stand for
it.
pg103-p5-s1: After all, our problems were of our own making.
pg103-p5-s3:
Besides, we have stopped fighting anybody or
anything.
pg103-p5:
After all, our problems were of our own making. Bottles were only a symbol. Besides, we have stopped fighting anybody or
anything. We have to!
